source.sourcePath: raw/sources/RA/04_제품별 인허가 진행 문서/2023 시험소 규격업데이트/ADD/접수자료/EMC 접수자료 231219/3. EUT Internal Operating Frequencies/ADD(1G) Detector 기타 서류 231220.docx

sourceSummary.oneLine: ADD(1G) Detector document listing EUT internal operating frequencies and tested power interface conditions.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Supports EMC or regulatory test documentation by identifying EUT clock frequencies and tested voltage modes.
keyPoints: EUT internal operating frequencies are listed for MCU, MPU, LAN, SerDes, and FPGA functions.
Power interface tested voltage modes include AC 100 V, 220 V, 230 V, 240 V and DC 11.1 V battery.
AC test modes are single phase at 50 Hz or 60 Hz.

evidence.claim: The source document title is ADD(1G) Detector 기타 서류.
The document contains an EUT Internal Operating Frequencies section.
The MPU frequencies include 24 MHz for PLL, USB and related functions and 32.768 MHz for RTC.
evidence.evidenceText:
24 MHz

MPU(PLL,USB and so on)

32.768 MHz

MPU(RTC)

evidence.claim: The FPGA internal frequencies listed are 80 MHz, 50 MHz, and 25 MHz.
evidence.evidenceText:
80 MHz

FPGA(Internal)

50 MHz

FPGA(Internal)

25 MHz

FPGA(Internal)

evidence.claim: The document contains a Power Interface (Tested Voltage) section.
AC tested voltage modes include 100 V at 50 Hz, 100 V at 60 Hz, 220 V at 60 Hz, 230 V at 50 Hz, and 240 V at 50 Hz, all single phase.
The DC tested voltage mode is 11.1 V, single phase, with Battery comment.
